jee-mains-MOCK-1.subject: Physics
jee-mains-MOCK-1.text: A particle moves along a straight line with a velocity v = (3t² + 2t) m/s. What is the displacement of the particle between t = 1s and t = 2s?
jee-mains-MOCK-1.explanation: Displacement Δx = ∫v dt from 1 to 2. ∫(3t² + 2t)dt = [t³ + t²] from 1 to 2. Upper limit: (8+4)=12. Lower limit: (1+1)=2. Result: 12-2 = 10m.

jee-mains-MOCK-1.subject: Mathematics
jee-mains-MOCK-1.text: If A and B are two sets such that n(A) = 17, n(B) = 23 and n(A ∪ B) = 38, find n(A ∩ B).

jee-mains-MOCK-1.subject: Chemistry
jee-mains-MOCK-1.text: Which of the following quantum numbers determines the shape of the orbital?
jee-mains-MOCK-1.explanation: The Azimuthal quantum number (l) determines the 3D shape of the orbital (s=spherical, p=dumbbell, etc.).
